ddls:
CREATE TABLE "websites" (
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website */,
  "website_name" TEXT /* Name of the website */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the website */,
  "geographic_location" TEXT /* Primary geographic location of the website's target audience */,
  "device_types" TEXT /* Primary device types the website is optimized for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic metric entry */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the website */,
  "traffic" INTEGER /* Total traffic received by the website */,
  "pages_per_visit" REAL /* Average number of pages visited per session */,
  "bounce_rate" REAL /* Percentage of visitors who leave after viewing only one page */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded metrics */,
  "traffic_source" TEXT /* Source of the traffic */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Device type used to access the website */,
  "geographic_location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the traffic */,
  "session_duration" REAL /* Average session duration */,
  "new_vs_returning" TEXT /* Whether the traffic is from new or returning visitors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_metrics_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the website the report is about */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "segmentation_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used for segmenting the data in the report */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization used in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, client) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the website being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the session */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the website for this session */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session started */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session ended */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Device type used for the session */,
  "geographic_location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the user during the session */,
  "session_duration" REAL /* Duration of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the website related to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high bounce rate) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the website */,
  "load_time" REAL /* Time taken to load the website */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time taken to respond to requests */,
  "error_rate" REAL /* Percentage of requests resulting in errors */,
  "load_time_by_device" TEXT /* Load time segmented by device type */,
  "response_time_by_device" TEXT /* Response time segmented by device type */,
  "error_rate_by_device" TEXT /* Error rate segmented by device type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)
